overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk night market in a video game, starting from a steamy commercial kitchen, passing through a food stall with red lanterns, exploring a trash-filled back alley with industrial pipes, and emerging onto a neon-lit main street.

industrial green metal door with yellow warning stripe at top
steam rising from ceiling vents creating atmospheric haze
yellow wet floor caution sign on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a steamy commercial kitchen back room with metal shelving units on the left and a green metal door ahead. Steam rises from ceiling vents creating a hazy atmosphere, and a yellow caution sign sits on the tiled floor.

bright linear fluorescent light above the prep area

woks and pans hanging above the service window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the kitchen prep area with a stainless steel sink on the right and fluorescent lighting. A chef is visible working behind the service window ahead, with hanging cookware visible above the pass-through opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter with red lanterns

events.description: exiting the indoor kitchen into the semi-covered food stall area with red lanterns

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging above the food stall
vertical pink and blue banner with 'WASABI MARKET' text
stainless steel counter with bowls and food preparation items

traditional stone lantern decorations near the counter entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the kitchen into a semi-covered food stall area decorated with red paper lanterns and a prominent 'WASABI MARKET' banner. Customers sit on green stools at the counter, and traditional stone lanterns mark the entrance to the alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service alley with industrial ventilation

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the sky visible between the tall buildings and industrial pipes
camera turns around to head back toward the main street

agents.ego_description: exploring the back alleyway, looking up at the industrial pipes and surrounding buildings, then turning back

entered.detail: large white industrial ventilation pipes running along the ceiling and walls
large red industrial dumpster against the back wall
external air conditioning units mounted on the alley walls
open skylight between buildings showing the night sky above
litter and debris scattered across the concrete alley floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow back alley with industrial ventilation pipes overhead and a red dumpster at the end. The ground is littered with trash, and air conditioning units line the walls. The camera looks up through an overhead skylight between buildings before turning to head back out.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with neon advertising

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into the wide open main street with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street with neon billboards and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic car parked along the curb

entered.detail: large digital billboards with bright neon advertisements on building facades
futuristic cars parked along the side of the street
illuminated green 'PARKING' sign hanging over the street
trees with pink foliage in street planters
tall buildings covered in neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the alley onto a wide main street illuminated by massive neon advertising billboards and digital signage. Futuristic vehicles are parked along the wet asphalt street, and a green 'PARKING' sign hangs overhead. The scene opens up to show tall cyberpunk buildings covered in neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic, steamy interior of a commercial kitchen out into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins in a hazy back room filled with steam and metal shelving, moving through a fluorescent-lit prep area past a working chef and stainless steel sinks. As the camera exits the kitchen, the environment shifts into a semi-covered food stall decorated with red paper lanterns and a Wasabi Market banner where customers sit on green stools. The scene then narrows into a grimy back alley lined with industrial pipes and trash-strewn ground, glancing up through a sliver of skylight before turning toward the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley onto a wide main street, where the cramped corridors open up to reveal wet asphalt, futuristic vehicles, and towering buildings drenched in the glow of massive neon billboards.
